name: Test Pattern 1
description: Periodic cubic-spline interpolant of y = (1 - cos(2*pi*x)) / 2 sampled at 0, 1/4, 1/2, 3/4. Slopes are 0, 3, 0, -3 (NOT the analytical pi, -pi): solving the periodic tridiagonal system for these four values yields these slopes, which makes the per-segment cubic Beziers C2-continuous (no acceleration jumps at the anchors). Position deviates from the true sinusoid by ~1%. Handles encode the parametric tangent (dx, dy) where dy/dx is the geometric slope at the anchor; dx = 0.25 (= segment span) keeps x(u) strictly monotonic per segment.
